description: Custom WAF rules for AhmedETAP Platform — layered on top of Akamai's managed rule sets (KRS). These rules are application-specific and catch attacks that generic signatures miss.

rules.name: Block JWT tampering attempts
rules.description: Block requests where the Authorization header contains a JWT with modified alg=none or weak algorithms (HS256 with empty key attacks).
rules.notes: Inspects JWT structure in the Authorization header. Combined with origin-side JWT validation (api/dependencies.py), this catches malformed/tampered tokens at the edge.

rules.name: Block excessive payload size on auth endpoints
rules.description: Auth endpoints don't need large payloads. Block any POST to /api/v1/auth/* with a body larger than 4KB to prevent buffer overflow and DoS attempts.

rules.name: Block non-JSON content type on API POST/PUT
rules.description: All API mutating endpoints expect application/json. Block requests with other content types to prevent content-type confusion attacks.

rules.name: Block HTTP method override attacks
rules.description: Block requests that try to override the HTTP method via headers (X-HTTP-Method-Override, X-Method-Override, X-Method-Override). These can bypass WAF method restrictions.

rules.name: Block credential stuffing patterns
rules.description: Detect credential stuffing by looking for common test credential patterns in login requests. Blocks 'test:test', 'admin:admin', 'user:password', etc.
rules.action_detail: Issue a CAPTCHA challenge instead of blocking outright — legitimate users with weak passwords can still proceed after solving the challenge.

rules.name: Block requests with no User-Agent
rules.description: Legitimate browsers always send a User-Agent header. Missing UA often indicates scripted attacks. Combined with Bot Manager, this catches basic scrapers.

rules.name: Block requests with unusual Accept headers
rules.description: Block requests with Accept headers that don't include text/html, application/json, or */*. These are often automated tools.

rules.name: Rate limit: registration abuse
rules.description: Block more than 3 registration attempts per IP per hour. Prevents mass account creation.

rules.name: Block SSRF patterns in JSON body
rules.description: Block requests containing internal IP addresses, localhost, or cloud metadata endpoints in the JSON body. Prevents Server-Side Request Forgery.

rules.name: Block path traversal in query parameters
rules.description: Block requests with ../ or ..\\ in query parameters. Catches path traversal attempts that bypass the generic WAF signature.
